reviews.review_description: So it's a cheap game but it's quite underwhelming, your throttle is controlled via the shifter on the center console while both your triggers are brakes,, there is no shifting, enjoy the sound of redlining your car the whole time, has potential but not in its current state with its current control setup. My suggestion to the devs is change the throttle system: right trigger for throttle, left for brake it's really difficult with the current sliding system, so much would be added with the ability to seamlessly operate the throttle and brakes without your hands leaving the wheel

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback. We truly value suggestions from our players as they help us improve the game experience. However, we feel that a 1-star rating may not fairly reflect the effort and intent behind the game and feels like review bombing. Our goal is to create fun, affordable games that everyone can enjoy without breaking the bank. If there are specific issues you'd like to see improved, we’d be grateful to hear more detailed feedback from you. Your input matters to us. you can contact us through email : maddytroupe@gmail.com

reviews.review_title: Fun and Rewarding VR Drifting Journey
reviews.review_description:
This VR drifting game has a lot going for it already. You race, drift, and compete to finish first, unlocking new cars, races, and maps as you progress. It’s a real progression-based experience that rewards practice and skill.
The feel of the drifting is solid, especially for an indie project, and it's great to see the developer so open to player feedback. They’re really working with the community to keep improving and making the game the best it can be.
If you're into drifting or racing and want to support a passionate dev team, it’s definitely worth a look. Excited to see where this game heads next!

developer_response.body: Thank you metaquesta.. thanks for the great comment

reviews.review_description: This is the steering that every other racing game should have. The best realistic race game.. please add more cars.
